name: oh-story-claudecode
description: A Chinese web-novel toolkit for market scanning, story analysis, long- and short-form writing, editing, review, import, cover generation, and project setup.

interface.shortDescription: 中文网文创作、拆解、审查与项目化写作工具箱
interface.longDescription: 覆盖长篇与短篇网文的扫榜、拆文、大纲、正文、去 AI 味、多视角审查、旧书导入、封面生成和写作项目基础设施部署。
defaultPrompt: Use $story to help me choose the right web-novel workflow.
Use $story-setup to prepare this repository for Codex story writing.
Use $story-review to review my latest chapter.
